message.content:
@startuml
participant Actor as User
participant Interface as Server
participant Interface as SuperHeroApi

section Backend Environment
    section [user search]
        alt
            GET /search?q=<queryValue>
                SuperHeroApi -> Server: getFromCache (queryValue) ?
                Server -> Server: binarySearch (query)
                Server <- Server: 200: queryValue
            end
        end
    end

    section [has in cache]
        alt
            200: queryValue
        end
    end

    section [not has in cache: request to API]
        alt
            GET queryValue
            SuperHeroApi -> Server: 200: queryValue
            Server -> SuperHeroApi: updateCache (queryValue)
            SuperHeroApi <- Server: 200: queryValue
        end
    end
end

User -> Server: GET /search?q=<queryValue>
Server <- User: 200: queryValue
@enduml
